title: Pica Blocks the Palace Route
description: Pages 1–5 focus on pica blocks the palace route, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy's allies push up the new plateau while Pica, Doflamingo's officers, and the Birdcage turn Dressrosa into a battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There is nothing my drill-head cannot read!!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Bring some people worth fighting next time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What's the deal with this army?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Heads up!! He's gonna let loose another punch!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The arm you destroyed will be back to normal soon enough!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: until we figure out how his ability works...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...It's just a waste of your strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: This is quite an irritating obstructruc- Tion...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: If we can't do something about it, we'll never reach the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I don't see his bull, either!! Did they get crushed to death?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Has he gone com- pletely mad?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Go for it, Ucy!!! It's a short- cut!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Yeah!! You go for it, Bull!!

summary: Pica Blocks the Palace Route develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
